title: UiPath (PATH) Earnings Date & Report - Investing.com
text: Investing.com provides earnings information for UiPath (PATH). The platform tracks earnings calendar, historical results, and analyst consensus. UiPath earnings call transcripts and summaries available for recent quarters. Fiscal 2026 results show sequential revenue growth from Q1 through Q4 with improving profitability metrics. Q1 FY2026 revenue $357M, Q2 FY2026 revenue $362M, Q3 FY2026 revenue $411M, Q4 FY2026 revenue $481M. Company achieved GAAP profitability in Q4 FY2026 for first time. ARR growth accelerating with customers adopting agentic automation capabilities. Earnings call transcripts highlight CEO commentary on AI strategy and competitive positioning. Management guidance shows confidence in fiscal 2027 with revenue target of $1.754-1.759B. Analyst coverage includes multiple ratings and price targets, with consensus suggesting volatility amid macro uncertainties.
